ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Extension Of Special Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng on behalf of Wallis Lim for Kathy Nakagawa.

Ms. Ng stated that she appeared for the purpose of having the special letters of administration extended as a favor to Mr. Lim. Ms. Ng also stated that no one has been advised of the request to extend the letters and that she has not informed anyone that she was appearing today. The Court will review the order and see if it can sign it. If the Court can not sign the order, it will let Mr. Lim know.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
